title: Software Consultant |BASE24eps|12 Months contract|
description:
Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Drive the BASE24eps Projects strategically to deliver quality product.
  • Understanding the Bank systems and preparing most accurate analyzed System Diagram, Transaction Flows, Banks switching business details.
  • Installing BASE24-eps and Co-supporting applications in HA designed System
  • Designing the Highly Available system Linux - RedHat, using Multiple Application server systems , Multiple Middleware (ICE-XS) systems , Multiple DB ( Oracle ) Systems.
  • Ownership of the complete BASE24eps projects implementation until Production deployment.
  • Should drive the projects from initiation phase to Production deployment.
  • Asses the risk associated with the testing and establish risk mitigation plan.
  • Should be able to assess and evaluate various tools/products perfectly suitable for NI environment for managing the Projects effectively.
  • Ensure proper Processes are followed for quality delivery of the Project.
  • Champion support in projects and developing a strong understanding of the projects impacting the BAU functionality thus ensuring quality delivery.
  • Be accountable for complete System Integration Testing.
  • Lead the BASE24eps projects Team situated across the globe.
  • Should own the complete System Integration System/User Acceptance Testing Environment.
  • Should be able to perform hands-on on BASE24eps, Simulators and other management tools like Jira, Confluence.
  • Support testing in all phases during the project execution cycle.
  • Work closely with client management to identify and specify complex business requirements and processes.
  • Research and evaluate alternative solutions and makes recommendations.

Requirements:  

  • Able to demonstrate the ability to undertake the above responsibilities.
  • Should have knowledge of HP Nonstop/Tandem Guardian platform
  • Passionate about the Software Implementation, Testing, Tools and Creative.
  • Should have previous experience of leading BASE24eps Team.
  • Experience with respect to test planning, execution and strategy.
  • Drive the complete testing best practices across the organization, while governing control and ensuring objectives are established and achieved.
  • Able to effectively communicate at all levels of the company.
  • Able to work well in small, collaborative team and fast paced environment.
  • Should possess strong working knowledge on EFT Switches especially BASE24-Classic and BASE24eps would be added advantage.
  • Should have strong working knowledge on FINSIM scripting for SIT, Regression testing and Load Testing.
  • Should have working knowledge of Base24 architecture and components as XPNET configuration, Device Handlers, Authorization processing, Host and Interchange management.
  • Should have knowledge of VISA/Mastercard/CUP/AMEX/DINERS interfaces (both issuing and acquiring processing)
  • Should have good knowledge in ISO 8583 message Specs
  • Should have knowledge of Agile Environment and worked on tools like Jira.
  • Experience: 2+ Years relevant work experience

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the above position please click the "Apply Now' button and send your resume to:

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd

EA License No: 01C4394| Saravanan| Reg No: 01C4394

You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to PERSOLKELLY Singapore Pte Ltd and its local and overseas subsidiaries and affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data to prospective employers/companies based in any country for purposes of evaluating  suitability for employment, conducting reference checks, administering employment related services, complying with Government’s health advisories and such other purposes stated in our Privacy Policy.

Our full Privacy Policy is available at https://www.persolsingapore.com/policies.  If you wish to withdraw your consent, please drop us an email at "sg.dataprotection@persolapac.com" to let us know. Please feel free to contact us if you have any queries.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
